history.summary: Added invisible boundary walls around rolling area
Created DicePool with multi-dice spawning and rollAll
PlayerRow + PlayerIcon, Goal/Player rows at top of viewport
BUG-001 investigation + runtime validation trap for lock mismatch
Fix BUG-001: wrong die stayed in pool after locking (generation key + remainingDiceValues)
Dice animation polish: slerp rotation on lock/unlock flights, staggered timing, casual Y rotation on split dice, roll from current position
Score counting animation in HUD and handicap Z scale-pop on PlayerIcon
Goal row transition: staggered roll-off exit and roll-in enter during round end
Tips system: contextual gameplay hints with slide-in banner, 4 tips for roll/lock/unlock phases
Layout restructure + profile groups: scaled dice, shifted rows, two-column profiles with star-score
AI lock animations: dice emerge from profile group at scale 0, fly to row slots scaling up
AI unlock animations: dice scale down 1→0, fly arc back to profile group
Pool dice exit animation: pop+shrink on round end
Pool dice spawn animation: fly from avatar with bounce+tumble on round start
Fix unlock/skip button persisting during unlock animations
